raw_consumer_statement:
This submission supplements CFPB Complaint No. XXXX. Photographs and supporting documentation previously provided are incorporated by reference. 

Subject : Continued Dispute Under XXXX Request for Compliance Review To Whom It May Concern, This letter serves as formal notice that I continue to dispute the charge of {$1200.00} under the Fair Credit Billing Act ( 15 U.S.C. 1666 ). 

My dispute involves misrepresented merchandise and supporting documentation previously submitted, including a XXXX professional evaluation and a police report. The denial response did not address the authenticity concerns raised and appears limited to confirming that merchandise was delivered, not whether it was accurately represented. 

Pursuant to the XXXX, I am requesting the following : A detailed accounting of how the {$510.00} minimum payment was calculated for XXXX and XXXX, excluding any disputed amount and related finance charges. 

Copies of all documentation relied upon in determining the charge was correct. 

Confirmation that online payment access for undisputed balances will not be restricted. 

Confirmation that no adverse credit reporting will occur while this dispute remains under active review. 

If the investigation relied solely on confirmation of delivery and possession, I request clarification as to how the authenticity evidence submitted was evaluated. 

I am also submitting a compliance review request through the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau and, if necessary, other appropriate regulatory channels. 

I look forward to your written response. 

Additional Compliance Concerns In addition to the substantive dispute : The minimum payment reflected for XXXX and XXXX appears to include the disputed amount and related finance charges. Under the Fair Credit Billing Act, disputed amounts should not be treated as due while under active investigation. 

I have been unable to submit payment online for the undisputed portion of the balance. This has created a barrier to maintaining the account in good standing while the disputed charge is under review. 

Payment Access Interference During the XXXX billing cycle, I was unable to submit payment online for the undisputed portion of my balance. This restriction required me to use an alternate payment method to prevent delinquency. 

Please provide : A written explanation for why online payment access was restricted. 

Confirmation of whether this restriction was system-generated or manually applied. 

Assurance that this restriction will not recur while the dispute remains under review.
